title: Puck's Parity Mod
description: A mod that adds over 900 new blocks and items to have parity between vanilla metals and stones.
body:
Welcome to Puck's Parity Mod. This mod adds numerous items and blocks to the game in order to have parity between the different types of metal and stones.
Note: Mod requires Fabric API and Fabric Shield Lib
New items include the following:
- Copper and Gold Buckets
- Copper and Gold Shields
- Copper and Gold Shears
- Copper and Gold Fire Starters
- Iron and Gold Brushes
- Copper Horse Armor
- Copper Nuggets

New blocks include the following:
- Stair, slab, and wall variants for every single type of stone
- Mossy, brick, tile, chiseled, and pillar version of every stone type
- Gold Doors and Trapdoors
- Copper "Player Only" Pressure Plates
- Gold and Iron Grates
- Cut Gold and Cut Iron
- Chiseled Gold and Chiseled Iron
- Gold Bulb and Iron Bulb
- Copper Bars and Gold Bars
- Copper Gate, Iron Gate, and Gold Gate
- Copper Chain and Gold Chain
- New Redstone Lantern variant, crafted with redstone torches
- Copper Lantern and Gold Lantern

This mod is still in beta, and as such, compatibility with other mods has not yet been tested. Please report any bugs you find.
